texto: For a seed to achieve its greatest expression, it must come completely undone. The shell cracks, its insides come out and everything changes. To someone who doesn't understand growth, it would look like complete destruction.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Cynthia Occelli: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a sucesso. O trecho “For a seed to achieve its greatest expression, it must come completely undone. The shell cracks, …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sucesso, awakening, enlightenment pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e enlightenment.

frase_original: For a seed to achieve its greatest expression, it must come completely undone. The shell cracks, its insides come out and everything changes. To someone who doesn't understand growth, it would look like complete destruction.

texto: If you love beauty, it’s because beauty lives within you. If you love art, it’s because you are creative. If it wakes up your heart, a receptor for it already exists within you. Your soul is drawn to the things that will help you unfold your most glorious expression. Give in. ― Cynthia Occelli
explicacao: Citação de Cynthia Occelli sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “If you love beauty, it’s because beauty lives within you.
